channel.title: Ghostties Beta Releases
channel.description: Beta and stable releases of Ghostties

item.title: Ghostties v0.1.0-beta.15
item.description:
What's new in v0.1.0-beta.15

Polish and stability fixes following the beta.14 smoke test.

Fixed

  • Dark mode titlebar now matches the canvas background color
  • Fullscreen icon position in the toolbar corrected
  • Canvas corner radius is now consistent on all four corners
  • Shadow depth between browser and terminal panels is now consistent
  • Sparkle update toast no longer appears in release builds

Full release notes on GitHub
